feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: No longer you
entry.summary:
Author: Rising_moon012

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,215Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Soulmates can be the earth's best gift to those willing to accept them. Fate chooses the perfect person for you to share your life with, and offers them to you on a silver platter covered with gold leaves and jewels. She tells you exactly how to find them and who they are, and all you have to do is allow yourself to let them share that bond and gift with you: A handprint is left on you from the moment you're born. Only you can see it, showing you exactly where your one true love will touch you for the first time, and when that happens, it disappears. A kind promise of Fate, as most say. The legend prophesies a Kingdom where magic is shunned, but soulmates are sacred. Where a royal heir will become the once and future king with the help and protection of a young warlock meant for greatness and a prince who sees too much. The moment they meet, and the bond is formed, the legend begins. And nothing can, or will ever, change it. If you believe in Fate, that is.   OR Merlin and Arthur share a soulmate: Romeo Aster. (A merlin BBC rewrite with an original character in the middle)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 900Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. Each one can be read on it's own. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Drabbles
  • some will eventually be mature
  • 100 words each exactly
  • some are AU and some are canon compliant

entry.title: I thought I knew you
entry.summary:
Author: Capricorn00

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,554Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Merlin can no longer stand the weight of his destiny, and the cost that he keeps paying for Arthur's sake. He's tired, and he's done with Camelot. He wants to leave. / I don't own Merlin, this is purely fanfiction and I make no profit from this.

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_p3ndragon

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,084Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 171

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,958Chapters: 3/11Kudos: 4

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

entry.title: Again
entry.summary:
Author: Igni_hendricks

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,052Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 511

Summary: When Merlin kills Morgana, she thinks it’s finally over. But then she wakes up several years in the past, in the heart of Camelot, surrounded by the very people she wants dead.She needs a plan, and she needs answers. Neither of these things turn out to be as simple as they seem, and Morgana begins to wonder if there could have been a different path for her after all.

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,020Chapters: 13/18Kudos: 427

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Merlin Goes to the Tavern
entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,619Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 120

Summary: While Arthur painstakingly repeals the ban on magic, he lashes out at Merlin. The warlock, meanwhile, just found out his mother wants to move to Camelot, and asks for a raise. Refusing to hear him out, Arthur snaps, and accuses Merlin of spending all his money at the tavern. So Merlin decides to finally go.Or, how Merlin ends up a bartender at the Rising Sun while in a fight with Arthur

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,145Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: Where might someone hear this from?
entry.summary:
Author: WheatReceipt

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,276Chapters: 6/15Kudos: 93

Summary: A formidable creature of mythology destined to kill Arthur, or die trying. So why's it chasing its tail in the middle of Gaius' storeroom?“Cath palug.” Merlin looks up from the stale scraps of bread he’s trying to convince himself he wants to eat, staring blankly back at Gaius. “You what?”

entry.title: look me deep in my eyes (like I’m a river worth wading)
entry.summary:
Author: coffeesculpordwarf

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,584Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: Merlin’s fury swells again, souring in his chest, and he fights to keep his hands steady, his stitches as neat as possible. “The king—“ he begins hotly before taking a breath and beginning again. “Your father should not be maiming you whenever you displease him!” Or: Merlin finds out that Arthur is being abused by Uther on a regular basis.

entry.title: Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,550Chapters: 7/16Kudos: 21

Summary: By the time Merlin stepped out of the elevator and into the lobby of Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon, he was already regretting every decision that had led him there. Merlin probably should have left the building immediately. Instead, he tightened his grip on the briefcase and headed toward the elevators. Because somewhere between Gaius getting sick and Will making that deal, common sense had apparently abandoned him entirely.

entry.title: Fibs and Potions.
entry.summary:
Author: Moss_Chomper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,501Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Arthur investigates an old woman, a suspected sorceress.She spills a liquid on him. Claiming it's a love potion. (Although it's a lie.) The old woman says it's a curse.He will be unable to resist the one who he holds most dear... That becomes a problem when he's the crowned prince who holds a secret fondness for his servant, Merlin. His attachment to the servant is no secret. But no one, not even Merlin himself.Knows how deep the prince's feelings go. Merlin also has a secret.He was born with magic in a time where any magic is outlawed.He will be killed if he were found out. Both desperately try to hide a side of themselves from the other. Who breaks first?

entry.title: Two Hearts, Bound by Fate
entry.summary:
Author: Encantus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,229Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Merlin Emerson, a hybrid Labrador/Wolf Therian (or Shifter) leaves his small town in Texas and travels to New Haven, Connecticut to attend Wildwood Academy, one of the most prestigious colleges for Shifters in America. While there he quickly realizes that his destiny is about to catch up with him when he bumps into his mate, purely by accident. He's arrogant, rude, and rich, the exact opposite of Merlin. Oh, and he's a Cat. Merlin will find a depth in Arthur that he isn't expecting, but also something more: a home. Somewhere he truly belongs, where he can be himself. Is this what he was looking for all along? Is this going to last? He certainly hopes it's not some cruel joke of fate.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,543Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Sure, Willing, but Able?
entry.summary:
Author: Idontknowguys

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,837Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: The beginning of a series of Merlin drabbles but the prompts are lyrics from my favorite songs of all time. (And also from the comments) AKA: Merthur x the new Noah Kahan album AAKA: Day One: "I Wish You Could Know Me"

entry.title: Scales and Ice
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,935Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 21

Summary: This is the Merlin/Heated Rivalry crossover no one asked for but I decided to write any way. Shane, Ilya, and Svetlana unexpectedly find themselves in Camelot. Will they find their way home? Do they decide to stay? And what does Morgana think about all of this?

entry.title: [Podfic] nice weather we're having
entry.summary:
Author: AnneException

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: 5 times they don’t acknowledge his magic, and one time they do. -- They both stared at each other for a long moment, silently daring the other to acknowledge what just happened. Merlin’s eyes glinting gold, the goblet stopping without him touching it—it was undeniable.There was no way Merlin could lie his way out of this.“...Wind is awfully strong today, sire.”Unfortunately, Merlin is stupid.“...Yes. Quite.”Fortunately, Arthur is too.Podfic of nice weather we're having by eliwithab.
